title: TC-UG-001: User Guides — Image Load for First 6 Visible Devices (Baseline)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to: App Settings → User Guides.
Observe the first 6 device entries visible on screen without scrolling.
For each of the 6 devices, verify the device image/thumbnail is rendered.
expected: All first 6 device entries display their respective device images correctly. No placeholder icons, broken image indicators, or blank spaces. Images are fully loaded and distinguishable per device model.

title: TC-UG-002: User Guides — Image Load Failure for Devices Beyond Scroll Threshold (Bug Reproduction)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to: App Settings → User Guides.
Scroll down slowly past the first 6 visible device entries to reveal devices 7, 8, 9, 10+.
Pause at each new row for 2 seconds to allow lazy-loading.
Visually inspect each device image for devices 7 through the end of the list.
expected: Every device entry beyond position 6 must display its correct device image. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE (Anti-Regression): Expected — All images loaded. Actual (If Bug) — Devices at position 7+ show broken image icons, blank placeholders, or grey boxes where the image should be, while first 6 devices render correctly.

title: TC-UG-003: User Guides — Image Load After Scroll Up and Down (Lazy-Load Cache Validation)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to: App Settings → User Guides.
Scroll down rapidly to the bottom of the device list.
Wait 3 seconds for lazy-loading to complete.
Scroll back up to the top of the list.
Observe device images for devices at positions 1-6 (top) and positions 7-10 (mid-scroll).
expected: All device images at all scroll positions are loaded and rendered correctly. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE (Anti-Regression): Expected — Images persist in cache and render on scroll-back. Actual (If Bug) — Images for devices beyond position 6 fail to load on initial scroll-down, and remain broken when scrolling back up, indicating lazy-load never triggered for those indices.

title: TC-UG-004: User Guides — Image Load Under Slow Network (3G Throttle)
steps: Set device network to 'Throttle to 3G' via Developer Options or network conditioning tool.
Launch Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to: App Settings → User Guides.
Immediately scroll down past the first 6 devices to position 10.
Wait up to 15 seconds for images to load.
Scroll back to top and inspect all device images.
expected: All device images eventually load given sufficient time under slow network. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE (Anti-Regression): Expected — Images for devices 7+ load after network delay (may appear as placeholders temporarily but resolve). Actual (If Bug) — Images for devices 7+ remain permanently broken/placeholder even after 15s wait, while first 6 devices loaded immediately, indicating a lazy-load pagination bug that only triggers for non-initial batch items.

title: TC-UG-005: User Guides — Image Load Under Offline Mode
steps: Enable Airplane Mode on the device.
Launch Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to: App Settings → User Guides.
Scroll down past the first 6 devices to the bottom of the list.
Observe image rendering for all devices.
expected: All device images should display correctly from local cache/resources if previously loaded. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE (Anti-Regression): Expected — Images for all devices render from cache. Actual (If Bug) — First 6 devices show cached images correctly, but devices 7+ show broken images or blank spaces, indicating images beyond the initial batch were never cached/preloaded.

title: TC-UG-006: User Guides — Image Load After App Restart (Cache Persistence)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to: App Settings → User Guides.
Scroll to the bottom of the device list.
Wait 5 seconds for all images to load.
Force-kill the app (swipe from Recent Apps).
Re-launch Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to: App Settings → User Guides.
Scroll to the bottom of the device list.
Observe image rendering for all devices.
expected: All device images at all positions load correctly after app restart. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE (Anti-Regression): Expected — Images for all devices render (from cache or re-fetched). Actual (If Bug) — Only first 6 devices show images; devices 7+ show broken images, confirming the lazy-load/resource-fetch logic is position-gated and not cache-reliant.

title: TC-UG-007: User Guides — Image Load After Orientation Change (Config Change)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to: App Settings → User Guides.
Scroll down to position 10 in the device list.
Rotate device to landscape orientation.
Wait 3 seconds.
Rotate device back to portrait orientation.
Observe image rendering for all visible devices, especially those beyond position 6.
expected: All device images render correctly after orientation change. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE (Anti-Regression): Expected — Images persist and re-render after config change. Actual (If Bug) — After rotation, only first 6 devices show images; devices 7+ show broken images or blank spaces, indicating the RecyclerView/ListView adapter resets and fails to re-trigger image loading for scrolled positions.

title: TC-UG-008: User Guides — Image Load After Bluetooth Device Connect/Disconnect (App State Interruption)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to: App Settings → User Guides.
Scroll down to position 10 in the device list.
While staying on User Guides screen, connect a Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC via Bluetooth.
Wait 3 seconds.
Observe device images for all visible entries.
Disconnect the Bluetooth device.
Wait 3 seconds.
Observe device images again.
expected: All device images remain loaded and rendered correctly during and after Bluetooth state transitions. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE (Anti-Regression): Expected — Images unaffected by Bluetooth connection events. Actual (If Bug) — Images for devices 7+ revert to broken/placeholder after Bluetooth connect/disconnect, while first 6 remain intact, indicating the list adapter rebinds and fails to load images for non-visible-range items.

title: TC-UG-009: User Guides — Image Load at Extreme Scroll Positions (Bottom of Very Long List)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to: App Settings → User Guides.
Scroll rapidly to the very last device entry at the bottom of the list.
Wait 3 seconds.
Observe the last device's image.
Scroll up one screenful and observe images for devices near the bottom.
expected: The last device entry and all devices near the bottom of the list display their correct device images. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE (Anti-Regression): Expected — All images loaded regardless of scroll depth. Actual (If Bug) — Only devices within the first screenful (positions 1-6) have images; all devices beyond that threshold show broken images, confirming a pagination/lazy-load index cap bug.

title: TC-UG-010: User Guides — Image Load While Scrolling Rapidly (Flings)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to: App Settings → User Guides.
Perform a rapid fling scroll from the top to the bottom of the device list.
Immediately after the fling stops, observe images for devices at positions 7-10 and near the bottom.
Perform a rapid fling scroll from bottom back to top.
Observe images for devices at positions 1-6.
expected: All device images eventually load after rapid fling scrolling completes. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE (Anti-Regression): Expected — Images load asynchronously after scroll settles. Actual (If Bug) — Devices 7+ show blank/placeholder images after rapid scrolling, indicating the image loading logic is not triggered for items that were skipped during fast scroll (missing onViewAttachedToWindow or similar callback handling).
